name: Housefull
overview: Bangladeshi dramaserial in an urban setting of the modern Dhaka, depicting colourful and interesting lifestyles of some families living in Dhaka. The typical Bangladeshi family and their personal lives make this house so full.

trailers.title: Special Drama House Full Plus (হাউজফুল প্লাস) | Fahmi, Mosharraf Karim, Shimu l NTV Bangla Natok
